scripts.test:unit: bun test tests/domain tests/application tests/interface-adapters tests/design-system tests/presentation tests/smoke.test.ts
scripts.test:unit:coverage: bun test --coverage --coverage-reporter=text tests/domain tests/application tests/interface-adapters tests/design-system tests/presentation tests/smoke.test.ts
scripts.qa:compose: docker compose -f docker-compose.qa.yml up --build --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from qa-chromium qa-chromium
